card.base: border-3 border-black bg-surface rounded-xl p-6 shadow-[6px_6px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)]

sidebar-nav.container: w-64 border-r-3 border-black h-screen sticky top-0 bg-surface
sidebar-nav.item-active: bg-primary border-3 border-black shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)] mx-4 rounded-lg

dark-card.base: bg-inverse-surface text-white border-3 border-black rounded-xl p-6 shadow-[6px_6px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)]

segmented-progress.segment: h-full border-2 border-black rounded-full bg-pastel-pink transition-all
